Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 16 

CONTRACT_ID 

LABEL: Part D Contract Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the Medicare Part D contract number for the beneficiary’s Medicare Part D plan. 

CMS assigns an identifier to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: XXXXX 

COMMENT: —
